query:
-- Find customers where one billing item is assigned to one service but other services of the same type have no revenue
-- Focus on ABB internet services where the billing item description is "Data - Internet"
SELECT 
  sba.billingItemExternalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount as billingRevenue,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  COUNT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServiceCount,
  -- How many internet services does this customer have total?
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services s2 
   WHERE s2.customerExternalId = bi.customerExternalId 
   AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet' 
   AND s2.provider = 'ABB'
   AND s2.status = 'active') as totalAbbInternetServices
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.description IN ('Data - Internet', 'Data - NBN')
  AND bi.lineAmount > 100
GROUP BY sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId, c.name
HAVING totalAbbInternetServices > 1
ORDER BY totalAbbInternetServices DESC, bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 15;

  bi.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName,
  COUNT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServiceCount,
  -- How many internet services does this customer have total?
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services s2 
   WHERE s2.customerExternalId = bi.customerExternalId 
   AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet' 
   AND s2.provider = 'ABB'
   AND s2.status = 'active') as totalAbbInternetServices
FROM service_billing_assignments sba
JOIN billing_items bi ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE bi.description IN ('Data - Internet', 'Data - NBN')
  AND bi.lineAmount > 100
GROUP BY sba.billingItemExternalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.customerExternalId, c.name
HAVING totalAbbInternetServices > 1
ORDER BY totalAbbInternetServices DESC, bi.lineAmount DESC
